title: Goderich Beachside Rapid
location: Knights of Columbus – Main Hall, 390 Parsons Court, Goderich, ON
description:
Time Control: 15 minutes + 10 seconds increment per move. CFC Rated (quick time control).
Round Schedule: Round 1: 10:00 AM · Round 2: 11:00 AM · Round 3: 1:00 PM · Round 4: 2:00 PM · Round 5: 3:00 PM
Forfeit Time: 5 minutes
Sections: Open and U1700
Registration: Please send your $20 entry fee e-transfer to goderichchessclub@gmail.com. Once that's completed, please fill out the register / inquire form. Registration will close on September 4th, 2026 at 9:00 PM.
To obtain a CFC membership, please use the Join the CFC button below. For membership fees please use the CFC Membership - Fees button below.

title: Spring Open
location: Goderich Library, 52 Montreal St, Goderich, ON
description: Our first official CFC rated tournament. Two sections, Open and U1700, with a strong turnout from across Huron County.
